evals.name: model-and-migration
evals.prompt: Create a Rails model called BlogPost with title (required, min 5 chars), body (text, required), and published_at (datetime, optional) fields. Generate the migration and include validations. Also add a scope for published posts.
evals.expected_output: A BlogPost model with proper validations and a migration file, plus a published scope

evals.name: controller-with-routes
evals.prompt: Create a Rails controller for user registrations. It should have new, create, and update actions. Use strong parameters, handle validation errors, and set up the routes. The controller should inherit from ApplicationController.
evals.expected_output: A RegistrationsController with proper strong params, error handling, and routes configuration

evals.name: api-endpoint
evals.prompt: Create a Rails API endpoint for listing products. It should return JSON, support pagination (page and per_page params), and include basic token authentication via X-API-Key header. Use API-only controller pattern.
evals.expected_output: An API controller with pagination, JSON rendering, and token authentication
